summary: DITTO v0.3 seed — provider wrapper and context packet — 모든 acceptance criterion이 pass로 기록되었다.

evidence.summary: Phase 3 provider wrapper scope, HostAdapter execution contract, failure taxonomy, profile policy, provider narrowing, and mock boundary fixed before implementation.
`ditto run with` UX fixed with explicit --work-item, optional --prompt, provider args after --, and exit semantics.
pass: success path plus provider non-zero, completion reject, spawn throw, signal kill, and mid-pipe failure fixtures validate manifest evidence fields.
pass: built-in adapters expose spawnRun and smoke tests spawned codex/claude in this environment.
HostAdapter keeps doctor methods and adds optional spawnRun execution contract.
pass: cwd escape rejected before spawn; five profile fixtures validate proxy env scrub and read-only/reviewer write detection via manifest.unverified.
pass: context packet markdown includes title/goal, acceptance verdicts, git state, and related run exit codes.

evidence.command: bun run src/cli/index.ts context build --work-item wi_260524qi9

evidence.summary: pass: manual RunStore schema round-trip remains intact and automatic run manifests validate against runManifest schema.

remaining_risks: profile별 권한 격리는 provider CLI 자체 기능과 OS sandbox 지원에 따라 완전 차단이 어려울 수 있다.
context packet은 Phase 5에도 별도 주제로 남아 있어 v0.3에서 과도하게 확장될 위험이 있다.
실제 Codex/Claude CLI 호출은 로컬 설치 여부와 버전에 의존한다.
